items.name: Chicken Momo
items.description: Made with local free-range ground chicken mixed with red onion, ginger, coriander and house spice. Served with your choice of freshly made achar.

items.name: Vegie Momo
items.description: Suitable for vegans! Fresh tofu, cabbage, carrot, ginger, house spices in handmade flour pastry. Cabbage pea shoot garnish. Served with your choice of achar!

items.name: Mushroom Momo
items.description: Suitable for vegans! Mushroom, cabbage, red onion, coriander, spring onion, ginger, house spices, in handmade flour pastry. Served with your choice of achar!

items.name: Potato + Snow Pea Tendrils Momo
items.description: Suitable for vegans! Potato, snow pea tendrils, spring onion, red onion, garlic, ginger and house spices, in a handmade flour pastry. Served with your choice of achar!

items.name: Pork Momo
items.description: Classic steamed momos made with local free-range ground pork, fermented greens, red onion, ginger, house spice, spring onion, coriander in handmade flour pastry. Served with freshly made achar of your choice!

items.name: Lamb Momo
items.description: Made with grass-fed, ground lamb meat mixed with red onion, ginger, coriander, house spice wrapped in handmade flour pastry. Served with your choice of freshly made achar.

items.name: 'IN LOVE' Choice of 2
items.description: Your choice of half and half.

items.name: Frozen Chicken Momo (16 pieces)
items.description: Please bring cooler bag/esky for frozen momo takeaway. Net weight 535g. Ingredients: free-range ground chicken, red onion, ginger, coriander, salt, house spice, wheat flour. Steam from frozen over high heat 15-20 minutes.

items.name: ANTI Roasted Cauliflower and Chickpea Salad
items.description: Turmeric cayenne pepper roasted cauliflower, chickpea, radish, red onion, sesame dressing, flat leaf parsley, lemon wedge.

items.name: CRUNCHY Greens with Potato Salad
items.description: Seasonal greens, potato, red onion, perilla and sesame seed dressing, lemon wedge.

items.name: WHOLE Sprouts and Fermented Greens Salad
items.description: Sprouts, fermented greens, red cabbage, radish, red onion, fresh chilli, citrus mustard dressing, coriander, lemon wedge.

items.name: Karma Organic Orange Mango Apple Juice
Remedy Small Batch Kombucha Yuzu Mandarin
Mateo Yerba Mate Soda Organic Ginger
